name: RPlog_Last_Night_on_Kichnar
title: Last Night on Kichnar
summary: In the mirror-walled casino of Kichnar Station, the smooth Corellian Paul Nighman courts the conflicted Ariana, sweeping her onto the dance floor while a web of watchful figures circles -- her brother Jase, the armored Detjin, Swanstee, Lando Calrissian, and the ever-observant Talon Karrde all trading guarded words and veiled scrutiny across the gaming floor. Drawing the unhappy Ariana away from the crowd and a brief encounter with Mara Jade in the hangar, Paul takes her aboard his ship, where over brandy, pasta, and cocoa she finally lets down her guard and weeps. As Ariana confides her despair, Paul comforts her and floats a future together -- a treasure-hunting venture chasing the legacy of the pirate Darius Nul -- before tucking the drowsing, drunken blonde into the captain's quarters to sleep it off.
